name: Naruto Fanfic - Recut
description: Access the Narucannon Recut fanedit series from PixelDrain.

search.code: const results = []; const items = ['1 - Land of Waves', '2 - Chūnin Exams', '3 - Search for Tsunade', '4 - Sasuke Retrieval Mission', '4.5 - Kakashi Chronicles', '5 - Kazekage Rescue Mission', '6 - Tenchi Bridge Mission', '7 - Akatsuki Suppression Mission', '8 - Itachi Pursuit Mission']; for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) { const title = items[i]; const match = title.match(/^(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*-\s*(.+)/); if (match) { const seasonNum = parseFloat(match[1]); results.push({ title: title, id: 'season_' + seasonNum, meta: { isSeason: true, seasonNumber: seasonNum, seasonName: match[2] } }); } } return results;

extractor.code: const seasonId = window._sora_item_id; if (!seasonId) { return { error: 'No season ID provided' }; } const seasonNum = seasonId.replace('season_', ''); const baseUrl = 'https://pixeldrain.net/d/CEG3sGRE'; return [{ name: 'Season ' + seasonNum + ' Folder', url: baseUrl, quality: 'default' }];
